$comment: Copy to config.json and edit for your install. These values populate NID templates, default capabilities, and budget defaults.
$comment_issuer: Domain fragment in NIDs: urn:nps:agent:{issuer_domain}:{agent_id}. 'dev.localhost' matches @nps-kit/identity DevCA. Override in production with your Org CA's domain.
$comment_issuer_agent: The agent_id that issued/dispatched tasks. main-agent, orchestrator, dispatcher, or whatever your orchestrator calls itself.
$comment_budget: Default per-task CGN ceiling. CGN = Cognon (raw sum of input + output + cache_read + cache_creation tokens, multiplied by model-family exchange rate, per NPS-0 §4.3). Override per-dispatch via --budget or per-category via category_budget_cgn below.
$comment_max_budget_cgn_per_node: Semantic-validator ceiling for Decomposer-emitted task-list node budgets. Rejects implausibly high budget_cgn values before dispatch.

category_budget_cgn.$comment: Per-category CGN ceiling. Used as the default --budget when the operator does not set one. Operators may override per-dispatch with --budget. Calibrate these values against actual CGN usage in your workload — reference values below are tuned for Sonnet at our typical patterns.

$comment_runtime: Agent runtime adapter: 'claude' (Claude Code CLI) or 'kiro' (Kiro CLI). Override per-dispatch with --runtime.
$comment_decomposer_cmd: Command to invoke as the Decomposer. stdin = DecomposeInput JSON; stdout = TaskListMessage JSON. Default is the trivial single-node fallback. Adopters override with a sophisticated LLM-backed Decomposer.
$comment_decomposer_timeout_ms: Max wall-clock milliseconds for a Decomposer invocation. Exceeded invocations receive SIGTERM; after 2s grace period, SIGKILL. Logged as a decomposer_failed escalation event with reason=timeout.
$comment_merge_hold_enforce: When true (default), cmd_merge refuses to squash-merge a task branch until the full task-list-state is green (all nodes terminal). Set to false only for emergency recovery from 4b bugs — every override then requires an explicit --force-merge flag and is captured as a manual_merge_override escalation event.
$comment_persona_set: Template directory under kits/agents/templates/ used to bootstrap worker personas. 'personas' (default) = tightened narrow-executor set for use with a sophisticated Decomposer. 'personas-legacy' = broad-intent-compatible originals for demo or trivial-fallback Decomposer use.
